patterns.message: Import design-system components from 'index.js', not component internals.

no-restricted-syntax.message: Raw hex color — use a design-system color token via var().
Raw px value — use a design-system spacing token via var().
Font not provided by the design system. Available: Geist, Geist Mono, Inter, IBM Plex Sans.
<Accordion> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: type, multiple, collapsible, defaultValue.
<Accordion> type must be one of 'single' | 'multiple'.
<Alert> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: variant.
<Alert> variant must be one of 'default' | 'destructive'.
<AlertDialog> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: open, defaultOpen, onOpenChange, children.
<Aside> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: variant, collapsible, side, defaultOpen, open, onOpenChange, sidebar.
<Aside> variant must be one of 'sidebar' | 'floating' | 'inset' | 'inverse'.
<Aside> collapsible must be one of 'offcanvas' | 'icon' | 'none'.
<Aside> side must be one of 'left' | 'right'.
<AspectRatio> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: ratio.
<Attachment> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: name, size, src, icon, state, scale, orientation, onRemove.
<Attachment> state must be one of 'idle' | 'uploading' | 'processing' | 'error' | 'done'.
<Attachment> scale must be one of 'default' | 'sm' | 'xs'.
<Attachment> orientation must be one of 'horizontal' | 'vertical'.
<Badge> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: variant, asChild.
<Badge> variant must be one of 'default' | 'secondary' | 'destructive' | 'outline' | 'ghost' | 'link'.
<Board> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: variant, columns, reorderable, cardsDraggable, dropIndicator, columnDropIndicator, cardDropIndicator, onReorder, onCardMove.
<Board> variant must be one of 'columns' | 'floating' | 'inset'.
<Board> dropIndicator must be one of 'outline' | 'line' | 'ghost'.
<Board> columnDropIndicator must be one of 'outline' | 'line' | 'ghost'.
<Board> cardDropIndicator must be one of 'outline' | 'line' | 'ghost'.
<Browser> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: url, align, favicon, tabs, onNewTab, tabsRow, variant, compact, lights, nav, controls, onBack, onForward, onRefresh, onCopy, height.
<Browser> align must be one of 'center' | 'left'.
<Browser> variant must be one of 'default' | 'muted'.
<Browser> nav must be one of 'full' | 'back' | 'none'.
<Bubble> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: variant.
<Bubble> variant must be one of 'assistant' | 'user'.
<Button> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: variant, size, asChild.
<Button> variant must be one of 'default' | 'outline' | 'ghost' | 'destructive' | 'secondary' | 'link'.
<Button> size must be one of 'default' | 'xs' | 'sm' | 'lg' | 'icon' | 'icon-xs' | 'icon-sm' | 'icon-lg'.
<ButtonGroup> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: orientation.
<ButtonGroup> orientation must be one of 'horizontal' | 'vertical'.
<Calendar> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: selected, defaultSelected, onSelect, month, defaultMonth, disabled.
<Checkbox> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: checked, defaultChecked, onCheckedChange, disabled.
<Chip> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: variant, media, selected, dropdown, onRemove, onClick.
<Chip> variant must be one of 'primary' | 'secondary' | 'outline' | 'ghost'.
<Choicebox> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: value, title, description, icon, checked, defaultChecked, disabled, type, name, onChange.
<Choicebox> type must be one of 'radio' | 'checkbox' | 'switch'.
<Collapsible> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: open, defaultOpen, onOpenChange.
<ColorPicker> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: colors, groups, value, defaultValue, onChange, columns, swatchSize, variant.
<ColorPicker> variant must be one of 'solid' | 'clear'.
<ComboboxOption> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: value, label.
<CommandItem> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: keywords, onSelect.
<ContextMenuItem> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: variant, inset.
<ContextMenuItem> variant must be one of 'default' | 'destructive'.
<DataTableColumn> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: key, header, sortable, align, cell.
<DataTableColumn> align must be one of 'left' | 'center' | 'right'.
<DatePicker> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: value, defaultValue, onChange, placeholder, width.
<Description> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: title, hint, inline.
<Dialog> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: open, defaultOpen, onOpenChange, children.
<DismissButton> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: size, shape, variant.
<DismissButton> size must be one of 'xs' | 'sm' | 'default' | 'md' | 'lg'.
<DismissButton> shape must be one of 'circle' | 'square'.
<DismissButton> variant must be one of 'default' | 'primary' | 'ghost'.
<Drawer> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: open, defaultOpen, onOpenChange, children.
<DropdownMenu> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: open, defaultOpen, onOpenChange, children.
<Emoji> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: name, size, label, className.
<Entity> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: variant, size, compact, selectable, checked, defaultChecked, onCheckedChange, loading, interactive.
<Entity> variant must be one of 'manage' | 'data'.
<Entity> size must be one of 'xs' | 'sm' | 'default' | 'lg'.
<Error> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: size.
<Error> size must be one of 'sm' | 'md' | 'lg'.
<FloatingButton> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: variant, size, extended.
<FloatingButton> variant must be one of 'default' | 'secondary' | 'surface'.
<FloatingButton> size must be one of 'sm' | 'md' | 'lg'.
<FloatingMenuAction> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: icon, label, id, onClick.
<Gauge> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: value, size, strokeWidth, showValue, color, secondaryColor.
<GridPickerItem> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: value, label, node.
<HoverCard> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: openDelay, closeDelay, children.
<Icon> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: name, size, strokeWidth, className.
<IconButton> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: icon, variant, size, label, labelPosition, readOnly, tooltip, tooltipSide.
<IconButton> variant must be one of 'ghost' | 'solid' | 'surface'.
<IconButton> size must be one of 'sm' | 'md' | 'lg'.
<IconButton> labelPosition must be one of 'top' | 'bottom' | 'left' | 'right'.
<IconButton> tooltipSide must be one of 'top' | 'bottom' | 'left' | 'right'.
<InputGroupAddon> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: align.
<InputGroupAddon> align must be one of 'inline-start' | 'inline-end' | 'block-start' | 'block-end'.
<InputOTP> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: maxLength, value, defaultValue, onChange.
<Item> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: variant, size, asChild.
<Item> variant must be one of 'default' | 'outline' | 'muted'.
<Item> size must be one of 'default' | 'sm' | 'xs'.
<LoadingDots> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: size.
<PictoPicker> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: color, defaultColor, onColorChange, colorControl.
<PictoPicker> colorControl must be one of 'top' | 'none'.
<Message> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: role, name, avatar.
<Message> role must be one of 'assistant' | 'user'.
<MultiSwitchOption> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: label, value, icon.
<Overlay> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: open, fixed, onClick.
<PanelPickerEntry> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: id, label, icon, node, action.
<Phone> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: url, bottomBar, notch, width, screen, onBack, onMore.
<Picto> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: name, size, strokeWidth, className.
<Popover> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: open, defaultOpen, onOpenChange, children.
<Progress> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: value.
<ProjectBanner> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: variant, icon, action, onDismiss.
<ProjectBanner> variant must be one of 'neutral' | 'info' | 'warning' | 'error'.
<RadioGroup> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: value, defaultValue, onValueChange.
<ReactionItem> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: emoji, count, active.
<ResizablePanelGroup> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: direction.
<ResizablePanelGroup> direction must be one of 'horizontal' | 'vertical'.
<SearchInput> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: value, defaultValue, onChange, onSearch, onClear, placeholder, size, icon, debounce, disabled, autoFocus.
<SearchInput> size must be one of 'sm' | 'default' | 'lg'.
<Select> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: value, defaultValue, onValueChange, children.
<Separator> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: orientation, decorative.
<Separator> orientation must be one of 'horizontal' | 'vertical'.
<Sheet> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: open, defaultOpen, onOpenChange, children.
<SidebarProvider> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: defaultOpen, open, onOpenChange.
<Slider> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: value, defaultValue, range, min, max, step, disabled, onValueChange.
<Snippet> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: text, prompt, commands, width.
<Spinner> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: size, variant.
<Spinner> variant must be one of 'ring' | 'bars'.
<StatusDot> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: status, pulse, label, size.
<StatusDot> status must be one of 'ready' | 'error' | 'warning' | 'info' | 'neutral'.
<Switch> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: checked, defaultChecked, onCheckedChange, disabled, size, icon, checkedIcon.
<Switch> size must be one of 'sm' | 'md' | 'lg'.
<Tabs> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: value, defaultValue, onValueChange, orientation.
<Tabs> orientation must be one of 'horizontal' | 'vertical'.
<Display> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: size.
<Display> size must be one of 'sm' | 'md' | 'lg' | 'xl'.
<ThemeSwitcher> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: value, defaultValue, onValueChange, showLabels.
<ThemeSwitcher> value must be one of 'light' | 'system' | 'dark'.
<ThemeSwitcher> defaultValue must be one of 'light' | 'system' | 'dark'.
<ToastOptions> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: title, description, duration, type, action.
<ToastOptions> type must be one of 'default' | 'success' | 'error' | 'warning' | 'info' | 'loading'.
<Toggle> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: pressed, defaultPressed, onPressedChange, variant, size.
<Toggle> variant must be one of 'default' | 'outline'.
<Toggle> size must be one of 'default' | 'sm' | 'lg'.
<ToggleGroup> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: type, value, defaultValue, onValueChange, variant, size.
<ToggleGroup> type must be one of 'single' | 'multiple'.
<ToggleGroup> variant must be one of 'default' | 'outline'.
<ToggleGroup> size must be one of 'default' | 'sm' | 'lg'.
<TooltipContent> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: side, size, shortcut, hint, media, dismissible, description, footerLink, action, variant.
<TooltipContent> side must be one of 'top' | 'right' | 'bottom' | 'left'.
<TooltipContent> size must be one of 'default' | 'sm'.
<TooltipContent> variant must be one of 'muted'.
<Truncate> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: side, position, tail, reveal.
<Truncate> side must be one of 'top' | 'right' | 'bottom' | 'left'.
<Truncate> position must be one of 'end' | 'middle'.
<Truncate> reveal must be one of 'cursor' | 'rail' | 'cover'.
<List> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: ordered.
<Window> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: size, platform, variant.
<Window> platform must be one of 'macos' | 'windows'.
<Window> variant must be one of 'default' | 'muted'.
